name: arts-exhibition-brief
description: Structure exhibition/visitor brief from HTML or knowledge/culture — not ticketing advice

steps.text: Skill arts-culture-agent. Prefer published venue facts. Surface content warnings. No invented prices.

steps.goal: Using skill arts-culture-agent and knowledge/culture/ (especially aag-forever-tomorrow.md and arts-culture-framework.md), produce an exhibition brief: identity, dates, theme, ticketing model, content warnings, visitor logistics, sponsors, official URL, privacy pointer if stack known. Do not invent prices or omit mature-content notes when present in source.
criteria: Content warnings included when source has them
Official URL or source path present
